title: Leadership
intro: ValorForge Solutions is led by proven leadership with deep expertise in telecommunications, cybersecurity, IT modernization, and strategic consulting — combining decades of military service and Fortune 10 experience with enterprise-grade rigor.

leaders.name: Daryl Wilkerson
leaders.title: Managing Partner | Cybersecurity & IT Operations
leaders.paragraph1: Daryl Wilkerson is a technology and operations leader with more than 20 years of experience delivering large-scale transformation across cybersecurity, IT infrastructure, and enterprise operations. A retired Navy Commander who served during Operations Enduring Freedom and Iraqi Freedom, he brings a mission-first approach to solving complex operational and technology challenges.
leaders.paragraph2: During nearly two decades in telecommunications, Daryl helped lead enterprise initiatives supporting more than 200,000 employees and delivering over $1B in projected value. He holds a U.S. patent in authentication technology and is a Lean Six Sigma Black Belt.
leaders.paragraph3: Daryl co-founded ValorForge with partners to help government and industry leaders execute critical technology, cybersecurity, and digital infrastructure initiatives with the discipline, speed, and accountability required for mission success.

seoDescription: Meet Daryl Wilkerson, Managing Partner of ValorForge Solutions. Retired Navy Commander and cybersecurity executive with 20+ years leading enterprise IT transformation.
